evaluationCriteria.accuracy: Response correctly addresses the query with factually correct information
evaluationCriteria.relevance: Response uses information from the retrieved context appropriately
evaluationCriteria.completeness: Response covers all key aspects expected for the query
evaluationCriteria.grounding: Response does not hallucinate information outside the provided context
evaluationCriteria.clinicalAppropriateness: Response is suitable for clinical reference purposes

scoringRubric.5: Excellent - Accurate, complete, well-grounded, clinically appropriate
scoringRubric.4: Good - Mostly accurate and relevant, minor omissions
scoringRubric.3: Adequate - Correct but incomplete or some irrelevant information
scoringRubric.2: Poor - Significant omissions, inaccuracies, or hallucinations
scoringRubric.1: Unacceptable - Wrong, misleading, or dangerous information
